tasks.label: Run Rundr paired simulators
tasks.command:
set -euo pipefail
xcodebuild -project Rundr.xcodeproj -scheme 'Rundr Companion' -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 17 Pro with Apple Watch,OS=26.3.1' -derivedDataPath .derived-sim CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
xcrun simctl boot 'iPhone 17 Pro with Apple Watch' >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
xcrun simctl install 'iPhone 17 Pro with Apple Watch' "$PWD/.derived-sim/Build/Products/Debug-iphonesimulator/Rundr Companion.app"
xcrun simctl install 'Apple Watch Ultra (49mm)' "$PWD/.derived-sim/Build/Products/Debug-watchsimulator/Rundr.app"
xcrun simctl launch 'iPhone 17 Pro with Apple Watch' com.rundr
xcrun simctl launch 'Apple Watch Ultra (49mm)' com.rundr.watchapp

tasks.label: Run Rundr on Watch Series 11 (46mm)
tasks.command:
set -euo pipefail
xcodebuild -project Rundr.xcodeproj -scheme Rundr -destination 'platform=watchOS Simulator,name=Apple Watch Series 11 (46mm)' -derivedDataPath .derived-sim CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
xcrun simctl boot 'Apple Watch Series 11 (46mm)' >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
xcrun simctl install 'Apple Watch Series 11 (46mm)' "$PWD/.derived-sim/Build/Products/Debug-watchsimulator/Rundr.app"
xcrun simctl launch 'Apple Watch Series 11 (46mm)' com.rundr.watchapp
